subcodes.title: Words to Ida Finch and Fanny and Alma Knobloch, spoken on 1908-11-10
subcodes.first_line: We are having a very good meeting, very sweet and full of the Spirit. Thanks be to God that the love of Baha'o'llah has gathered us. Our countries are different
subcodes.subjects: @apostles; early disciples of Christ, @unity in diversity, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @many are called but few are chosen, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
